title: Kolkata Traffic Alert For Bengal Polls 2026: Diversions, No-Entry Zones & Vehicle Curbs On April 28, 29 And May 4
description: Kolkata Police announced a detailed traffic advisory for the West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026. Expect road closures, diversions, one-way movement, no-entry zones, parking bans, and goods-vehicle restrictions across key routes on April 28, April 29, and May 4.
